name: apps-desktop
description: Local-first desktop control plane for Recruit Agent
author: Codex

scripts.package: npm run release:prepare && npm run dist && npm run release:preflight && electron-builder --config ../../electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:dir: npm run release:prepare && npm run dist && npm run release:preflight && electron-builder --dir --config ../../electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:distribution: npm run release:prepare && npm run dist && npm run release:preflight:distribution && electron-builder --config ../../electron-builder.yml --publish never
